glosses.vi: nước chanh; nước ngọt có ga
glosses.ja: レモネード; 炭酸飲料

translations.en: I’m buying lemonade at the kiosk.
translations.es: Compro una limonada en el quiosco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在小卖部买柠檬汽水。
translations.pt: Estou comprando uma limonada no quiosque.
translations.vi: Tôi mua nước chanh ở quầy.
translations.nl: Ik koop limonade bij de kiosk.
translations.hi: मैं कियोस्क से नींबू पानी खरीद रहा हूँ।
translations.ro: Cumpăr o limonadă de la chioșc.
translations.ja: 売店でレモネードを買っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive action of purchasing.
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; direct object (thing being bought).
Contracted preposition (‘an dem’); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine singular, dative; object of the preposition ‘am’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Kinder teilen sich eine Limonade.

translations.de: Die Kinder teilen sich eine Limonade.
translations.en: The children are sharing a lemonade.
translations.fr: Les enfants se partagent une limonade.
translations.it: I bambini si dividono una limonata.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在分享一瓶柠檬汽水。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友一齊飲一支檸檬汽水。
translations.pt: As crianças estão compartilhando uma limonada.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ uống chung một chai nước chanh.
translations.hi: बच्चे नींबू पानी आपस में बाँट रहे हैं।
translations.ja: 子どもたちがレモネードを分け合っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject ‘Kinder’.
Common noun, plural, nominative; grammatical subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, here with reflexive for reciprocal meaning.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative; coreferent with the subject, marking reciprocal action.
Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of the object.
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; direct object (item being shared).

sentences.target: Mir ist die Limonade zu süß.

translations.de: Mir ist die Limonade zu süß.
translations.en: The lemonade is too sweet for me.
translations.es: La limonada está demasiado dulce para mí.
translations.fr: La limonade est trop sucrée pour moi.
translations.it: La limonata è troppo dolce per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这杯柠檬汽水对我来说太甜了。
translations.yue: 呢杯檸檬汽水對我嚟講太甜。
translations.pt: A limonada está doce demais para mim.
translations.vi: Với tôi, nước chanh này quá ngọt.
translations.ar: الليمونادة حلوة أكثر من اللازم بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: De limonade is te zoet voor mij.
translations.hi: मेरे लिए यह नींबू पानी बहुत मीठा है।
translations.pl: Lemoniada jest dla mnie za słodka.
translations.el: Για μένα η λεμονάδα είναι πολύ γλυκιά.
translations.nb: Limonaden er for søt for meg.
translations.id: Menurut saya, limun ini terlalu manis.
translations.sv: Lemonaden är för söt för mig.
translations.ro: Pentru mine, limonada e prea dulce.
translations.cs: Pro mě je limonáda moc sladká.
translations.da: Limonaden er for sød for mig.
translations.ja: 私にはレモネードが甘すぎる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; experiencer perspective (‘to me’).
Finite copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of subject ‘Limonade’.
Common noun, feminine singular, nominative; grammatical subject of the copular clause.
Degree adverb/particle meaning ‘too’; modifies the adjective ‘süß’.
Adjective, positive degree; predicative complement describing the subject.

sentences.target: Wir machen selbst Limonade mit Zitronen.

translations.de: Wir machen selbst Limonade mit Zitronen.
translations.en: We’re making our own lemonade with lemons.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo nuestra propia limonada con limones.
translations.fr: Nous faisons notre propre limonade avec des citrons.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo la nostra limonata con dei limoni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用柠檬自制柠檬汽水。
translations.yue: 我哋用檸檬自己整檸檬汽水。
translations.ru: Мы делаем домашний лимонад из лимонов.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo nossa própria limonada com limões.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tự làm nước chanh từ chanh.
translations.nl: We maken onze eigen limonade met citroenen.
translations.uk: Ми робимо власний лимонад із лимонів.
translations.hi: हम नींबुओं से घर की बनी नींबू पानी बना रहे हैं।
translations.el: Φτιάχνουμε τη δική μας λεμονάδα με λεμόνια.
translations.nb: Vi lager vår egen limonade med sitroner.
translations.id: Kami membuat limun sendiri dengan lemon.
translations.sv: Vi gör vår egen lemonad med citroner.
translations.ro: Facem limonadă de casă din lămâi.
translations.cs: Děláme si vlastní limonádu z citronů.
translations.da: Vi laver vores egen limonade med citroner.
translations.ja: 自家製のレモネードをレモンで作っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive action of producing.
Focus adverb emphasizing agentivity (‘on our own’).
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; direct object (thing being made).
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the means/ingredient.
Common noun, plural, dative; object of ‘mit’, indicating ingredients.
